<?php namespace Hamcrest\Type; /* Copyright (c) 2010 hamcrest.org */ use Hamcrest\Core\IsTypeOf; /** * Tests whether the value is a boolean. */ class IsBoolean extends IsTypeOf { /** * Creates a new instance of IsBoolean */ public function __construct() { parent::__construct('boolean'); } /** * Is the value a boolean? * * @factory boolValue */ public static function booleanValue() { return new self; } }
